name: USP消音版 | 皇家卫队
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted with a solid blue slide and finished with gold accents. It is rare that beauty is so obvious
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 它采用了蓝底金纹定制涂装。 惊世之美，锋芒毕露
